name: Dill-And-Caraway Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil over high heat in a large skillet and add pork.
2. Cook the pork on all sides over medium heat until it is light golden in color.
3. Meanwhile, mix together chicken stock and Dijon mustard in a small bowl.
4. When the pork is browned, add the chicken stock mixture to the skillet.
5. Cover the skillet and cook for 5 minutes.
6. Remove the cover and turn the tenderloins over.
7. Add cream and caraway seeds to the skillet and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
8. Transfer the tenderloins to a serving platter.
9. If the sauce is too thin, continue cooking until it coats the back of a spoon.
10. Slice the meat and arrange on the platter.
11. Add chopped fresh dill to the sauce and spoon over the sliced meat.
12. Serve immediately.
